structuralValidation.method: Pinned-identity reducer decoded the complete recorder-v2 GPS stack and independently inventoried product, input, label, and add-control identities. It reproduced all three suggestion filters and rows in native order, observed the same lower-plane 4-by-3 add control on both addable rows, and observed no add-control cell on the still-visible row matching the existing condition. Reducer summary: pass 8, fail 0, inconclusive 2; only Rule 0003 two-state binding remained inconclusive.
